sourceName: User-pasted Pizano's State Street menu capture

sections.name: Appetizers
items: Garlic Bread - fresh bread smothered with garlic butter, side of marinara
Cheesy Garlic Bread - covered with melted cheese, side of marinara
Hot Honey Pepperoni Cheesy Garlic Bread - served with marinara
Italian Beef Cheesy Garlic Bread - giardiniera and sweet peppers, served with spicy ranch
Wisconsin Cheese Curds - deep fried, served with marinara or spicy ranch
Fried Pickles - golden brown with spicy ranch for dipping
Fried Calamari - lightly breaded and seasoned with lemon and marinara
Bottoms Up Wings - mild to OH MY GOSH or BBQ, with blue cheese or ranch
Baked Meatball Skillet - served with garlic brushed crostinis
Cheese Sticks - golden brown with marinara for dipping

sections.name: Deep dish and thin crust pizza
items: Cheese Pizza - available in deep dish and thin crust sizes
Cheese, Sausage or Pepperoni Pizza - individual deep dish price is 14.25 in this State Street capture
Vegetarian Special - mushrooms, onion, green pepper
Mark's Special - sliced tomatoes, basil, fresh garlic
Rudy's Special - sausage, mushroom, onion, green pepper
Jeweler's Special - sausage, hot giardiniera
Gluten Free 10 inch pizza - sausage, mushroom, onion, green pepper
Individual carb-free pizza with sausage crust

Extra ingredients list includes anchovies, bacon, black olives, broccoli, garlic, green olives, green pepper, hot giardiniera, jalapenos, mushrooms, onion, pepperoni, pineapple rings, sausage, sliced tomatoes, spinach

Brown Rice Fusilli Pasta - topped with meat or marinara sauce
Pastaria includes a Gluten Free Fusilli option
Pastaria base sauces: butter, meat, marinara, or olive oil and garlic
Pastaria premium sauces: Alfredo, Hot Mama's, Pesto, Vodka Sauce

sections.name: Sandwiches and desserts
items: Chicken Bacon Pesto Ranch Sandwich - breaded chicken, bacon, mozzarella, pesto ranch on French bread
Holly and Little Rudy's Cookie - freshly baked chocolate chip cookie with ice cream, syrup, and whipped cream
Annette's Cookie - freshly baked peanut butter cookie with ice cream, caramel, and whipped cream
Traditional Cheesecake - chocolate, caramel, or strawberry

notes: Stored from a user-pasted State Street menu capture so future rescans can reuse it without refetching the site.

Compared against the user-pasted Chicago Loop menu capture, the menu items matched aside from location chrome and one substantive price difference: the individual deep dish cheese, sausage, or pepperoni pizza was 14.25 here versus 13.25 on the Loop page.
The pasted menu does not explicitly name tree nuts in the captured item descriptions, but pesto appears as both a pasta sauce option and a sandwich ingredient without a further breakdown.
